title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MARINE FISHERIES DEMONSTRATION-STATION IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5089 / 62 OG No. 22, 3748 (May 30, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4244, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MARINE FISHERIES DEMONSTRATION-STATION IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established and maintained under the supervision of the Commissioner of Fisheries a marine fisheries demonstration station in any suitable site in the Province of Cagayan.

SEC. 2. The sum of three hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to carry into effect the purpose of this Act during the fiscal year ending June thirtieth, nineteen hundred and sixty-six. Thereafter, the necessary amount for the purpose shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
